title: Security Audit D — Access / Authorization / Data Exposure

findings.title: models: service_role ALL policy is role-scoped
findings.summary: Policy 'Service role full access models' uses qual true only for roles {service_role}; not applicable to authenticated JWT.

findings.title: Watchlist tables: no FOR ALL policies on model_embeddings, model_locations, model_agency_territories, calendar_entries, model_minor_consent
findings.summary: Query returned empty set for cmd=ALL on listed tables.

findings.title: No direct profiles.is_admin = true in policy USING clauses
findings.summary: Count 0 for is_admin=true / is_admin = true in qual (aligns with rls-security-patterns Gefahr 1).

findings.title: option_request_visible_to_me enforces participant/org/model scope
findings.summary: SECURITY DEFINER with row_security off; branches for model user, client org (and legacy org/client_id), agency org with assignee rules.

findings.title: can_view_model_photo_storage has row_security=off; client path requires model_photos row + visibility
findings.summary: Live proconfig includes row_security=off; migration documents IDOR-safe binding to model_photos URL for clients.

findings.title: claim_model_by_token: single-use atomic claim
findings.summary: Raises token_already_used; UPDATE ... WHERE used_at IS NULL with ROW_COUNT check; links models.user_id only when NULL.

findings.title: getOptionRequests optional orgId — RLS-only path when omitted
findings.summary: Code warns when orgId omitted; cross-org isolation depends on option_requests RLS + option_request_visible_to_me (verified on Live).

findings.title: conversation_accessible_to_me has row_security=off on Live
findings.summary: Matches MED-3 intent; messages/conversations policies use this helper or equivalent org-member SELECTs.

findings.title: Duplicate SELECT policies on conversations (OR semantics)
findings.summary: conversations_select_access and Org members can read org conversations both apply; redundant but not contradictory in sampled quals.

findings.title: booking_details JSONB — UI scope filter only
findings.summary: Documented: anyone who may SELECT calendar_entries row receives full booking_details; field-level visibility is client-side.

findings.title: Repo vs Live: option_requests/conversation evolution split across root SQL and migrations
findings.summary: Authoritative behavior confirmed via Live queries this run; future changes should add dated migrations and re-verify pg_policies.

liveVerificationRequired.reason: Not in scope of SQL/service pass; JWT verification and body validation need separate review.
assert_is_admin() coverage on every admin_* routine not exhaustively grep-verified in this audit.
postgres_changes RLS behavior assumed per Supabase platform; no E2E replay test executed.
